insight: "Adventure failed to convert..." WARN spam (12.0.5+) is from SimpleComponent.toAdventureJson called per chat packet by PacketListener.SimpleChatAdapter to cache originalJson for [X]/edit. adventure-platform-paper rejects item-hover NBT with empty-string root entries or hex-color nested extras, regardless of source plugin (CMI, InteractiveChat, kit items). Player message unaffected via legacy fallback; Foundation PR #445 adds a quiet null-returning variant for the listener.
